faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about HotelLink.

items.question: How does HotelLink help with work permits?
items.answer: HotelLink provides a comprehensive work permit workflow tool. We guide both hotels and candidates through the Turkish work permit application process, with document checklists, status tracking, and expert guidance.

items.question: What nationalities can apply for jobs in Türkiye?
items.answer: Workers from most countries can apply for jobs in Türkiye. Common nationalities on our platform include Ukrainian, Russian, Uzbek, Kyrgyz, Kazakh, Georgian, Filipino, and many more. Specific visa requirements vary by nationality.

items.question: How are hotels verified on HotelLink?
items.answer: All hotels go through a verification process where we check their business registration, tax ID, and other official documents. Verified hotels display a badge on their profile, giving candidates confidence in the legitimacy of the opportunity.

items.question: Is it free for candidates to use HotelLink?
items.answer: Yes, HotelLink is completely free for job seekers. Creating a profile, uploading documents, browsing jobs, and applying are all free of charge.

items.question: What hotel types are on the platform?
items.answer: We work with all types of hospitality businesses including 5-star luxury resorts, boutique hotels, thermal hotels, apart-hotels, city hotels, and more — primarily in tourism hotspots like Antalya, Istanbul, Bodrum, Marmaris, and Cappadocia.

items.question: Can HR agencies use HotelLink?
items.answer: Yes! HR agencies have a dedicated plan with tools for managing candidate pools, submitting bulk applications, tracking placements, and building partnerships with hotels.
